fieldGuide.id: Stable catalog id used by botology for matching and rule references.
fieldGuide.category: UI group heading for the row.
fieldGuide.displayName: Visible row label shown in the manager window.
fieldGuide.matchTokens: Plugin names or internal names botology will match against installed/runtime plugin data.
fieldGuide.notes: Long-form warning/help text shown in the (?) popup and reused in green/yellow/red rows.
fieldGuide.description: Optional plugin summary for the Category / Plugin (?) popup. If omitted, botology tries repo.json data and otherwise falls back to placeholder description.
fieldGuide.repoUrl: Optional repository homepage or source URL used by the Repo button.
fieldGuide.repoJsonUrl: Optional concrete repo.json URL or human note shown by the [Copy] button.
fieldGuide.repoJsonUrls: Optional array of multiple concrete repo.json feed URLs. Botology merges metadata across them and [Copy] copies them all.
fieldGuide.ruleType: Optional built-in assessment rule. Omit it to fall back to the compiled default handling for that id.
fieldGuide.relatedIds: Optional plugin ids consulted by paired/direct/bossmod rules.

ruleTypeGuide.autoduty_conflict: Marks the row red when AutoDuty is loaded.
ruleTypeGuide.paired_conflict_yellow: Marks the row yellow when any relatedIds entry is loaded.
ruleTypeGuide.paired_conflict_red: Marks the row red when any relatedIds entry is loaded.
ruleTypeGuide.direct_conflict_red: Marks the row red when any relatedIds entry is loaded.
ruleTypeGuide.rotation_conflict: Marks the row yellow when another rotation/bossmod rule-driven entry is loaded.
ruleTypeGuide.bossmod_pair: Marks the row red when any relatedIds bossmod rival is loaded; otherwise falls back to rotation_conflict.
ruleTypeGuide.loaded_warning_yellow: Marks the row yellow whenever the plugin itself is currently loaded.

plugins.notes: There is no reason to uninstall this plugin unless you want to save space on your HD. Its operations are clean and non-interfering with the rest of the game.
plugins.description:
Your personal Henchman doing all the heavy lifting for you!

- A/B Rank Farmer
- Hunt Logs (incl. Multibox Carry)
- Hunt Bills
- Retainer Creation
- Character Creation
- Multi Account Trading
- Ocean Fishing
- Chocobokeeps
and more to come.
